titleStmt.title: SII 16.209: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 209. (A.R. No. 403 of 1920.) CHINNAHŌTŪRU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Vaiśākha śu. 15 corresponding to 1556 A.D., April 24.

The inscription is fragmentary and records the gift of income derived from the tyāgavarttana collected from the sarvamānya-agrahāra village of Pinahōtūru alias Dēvarāyapuram in Vurokoṇḍa-vēṇṭhya of Rāyadurga-rājya for the Dhanurmāsaworship of god Chennakēśava of Hōtūru, by the Vipravinōdins Rudraya, his son Gōvindaya and Vallabhaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1478 naḷa saṁ
vatsaraṁ vaiśākha śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛuthvisāṁmrā
ḍagānu rāyadu¨rgaṁrājyaṁtōni purokoṁḍa vēṁṭhyānaku cellēṭi pinahōtūriki
maina dēvarāyapuramanēṭi sa¨rvamānyaAgrāhāramaṁdu vēṁcēśi Uṁna
kōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāyakuṁḍaina catu¨rdaśabhuvanādhīśvaruṁḍaina śrī
ra mū¨rtiki kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuḥśākhādhyāyulaina
di praḷayakālaṁ gōviṁdaiya pautṛlaina rudrayavāri putrulu gōviṁdayavā
nu vasiṣṭagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuḥśākhādhyāyulaina vipravinōdi
yagāri pautrulaina vīraya putruḍu vallabhayānu Aṁttu jana 3 nu Ēkasthulai yi
śāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu yī hōtūri Agrāhāramaṁdu vēṁcēśiUṁnna śrī caṁnnakē
dēUni dhanu¨rmāsa pūjaku yajanādiṣaṭka¨rmaniratulaina yī hōtūri Aśēṣa vidvanya
lu vipravinōdulaku prativa¨rṣaṁ yiccēṭi tyāgava¨rtanalu nānāgōtraṁ nānāsūtraṁ
śākhādhyāyulaina vipravinōdulaṁdariki puṇyaṁgānu hōtūri śrīcaṁnakēśava
dhanu¨rmāsapūjaku trivācā dhāravōstimi śrī caṁnakēśavadēUniki Aśēṣavidva
janāluṁnu prativa¨rṣaṁ vipravinōdulaṁdariki yicēṭi tyāgavata nalu dhanu[¨rmā]
pūjaku yīgalavāru yī dha¨rmānaku vipravinōdulu yavaru tappinānu tamatama
pitāḷanu kāśilō vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōduru yiṭani yicina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ dā
lanayō¨rmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvaga mavāpnōti pā
dacyutaṁpadaṁ . yī dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ vēyiṁcina vipravinōdula voppi
gōviṁdayavrālu tidharivrālu vallabhaiya vrā
śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
